drill_description: When any descriptor does not declare local-core continuity (local_core_continuity_allowed=false), the page narrows to 'beta' because the local-core continuity condition is not met.
trigger: Set local_core_continuity_allowed=false on any descriptor (e.g. issue_tracker:installation_grant). The audit evaluates all conditions and finds condition 3 (local-core continuity) violated.
